about.title: About Me
about.p1: In short: I'm a person who talks to computers — and sometimes they actually listen. As a full-stack developer, I obsess over pixels on the frontend and fight with databases on the backend. Sometimes I win, sometimes ChatGPT wins.
about.p2: When I'm not coding, I'm chasing new technologies, starting side projects and jumping to new ones before finishing half of them, or promising myself 'this time I'll actually finish it.' Spoiler: I don't. But at least I'm having fun.

stack.title: My Inventory
stack.subtitle: Items collected on my coding adventure.

frontendSkills.react: useEffect dependency arrays still give me nightmares.
frontendSkills.nextjs: Every new version = relearn the entire project.
frontendSkills.tailwind: I know 'flex justify-center items-center' by heart.

backendSkills.python: I admit I've lost 2 hours to an indent error.
backendSkills.postgresql: Writing JOINs makes me feel like a hacker.
backendSkills.java: AbstractSingletonProxyFactoryBean... I'm used to it now.
backendSkills.springboot: The art of coding through annotation stacking.

projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.subtitle: A few things I've built that I'm proud of.

items.title: Blockchain Document Verification
items.tagline: Blockchain-based smart document verification and approval system
bullets: Documents hashed with SHA-256, hashes registered on Ethereum blockchain
Files stored in S3-compatible off-chain storage
Built as a production-ready full-stack application from scratch

items.title: AI CV Builder & Job Matcher
items.tagline: AI-powered CV builder and job matching platform
bullets: AI-powered semantic search matching job listings with CVs
Smart system automating ATS-compatible CV generation
Modern and fast user experience built with Next.js

items.title: Restaurant Management System
items.tagline: Order and management system I built from scratch for our family restaurant
bullets: Table-based order tracking, takeaway & delivery support, half-portion options
Daily/monthly sales reports, bulk price updates, receipt printing
Admin/Waiter roles with user management — ended my dad's Excel suffering

items.description: Learning algorithms, data structures, software engineering and a whole lot more — mostly on my own.

items.company: Mehmet Akif Ersoy Anatolian High School
items.description: Where it all started. My passion for computers took shape here.
